hhiin
When the querist touches the right nostril, the woman in
question may conceive after a month ; when the left nostril or the
left ear, after two years ; when the right ear and the breasts, after
two months and four months respectively.
[The word being neuter in gender, would have been
proper. The metre is refar.]
^ g<TTq j W w ^ i
qrtTng uvoii
If the querist woman touches the root of her braid, she will
give birth to three sons and two daughters ; if the ears, five sons ;
if the hands, three sons ; if the little finger, one son ; if the ring
finger, two sons ; if the fore-finger, four sons j if the thumb, five
sons. If she touches the big toes or the heels, she will have a single
daughter.
[The metre is
If she touches her right and left thigh, she will beget two
daughters and two sons respectively ; if the middle of the forehead,
four sons : and if the end of the forehead, three sons.
[The author always uses in the sense of 'right' and
of 'left'.
Cf. qw?:—
